title: Tests: rename $TESTSDIR and $TESTDIR
body:
They cause way too much confusion. Rename $TESTSDIR (plural) to $TEST_SOURCES
and $TESTDIR (singular) to $TEST_SCRATCH_DIR.

In the process, refactor two commonly-used expressions ($WITH_POLICY_JSON and $BUDFILES).

Split into four separate commits, for ease of review.

comments.body: Suggestions welcome if you have better ideas for the new var names.

`TMPDIR` is impossible because that's a UNIX convention (path to a directory to be used for all temp files, usually pointing to `/tmp` or `/var/tmp`). I like `BUILDAH_TMPDIR` because it's consistent with the convention in podman tests, but I also think `TEST_SCRATCH_DIR` is slightly more descriptive, so I'll leave the decision up to the team.
